transcription.text: Hi, I'm a new customer and I want your best new smartphone deal. Well, I'm an existing customer and I'd like your best new smartphone deal. Do ya? Actually, it's for both new and existing customers. I feel silly. But I do want the fastest 5G network. Well, I want the fastest 5G network. Are we actually doing this again? It's not complicated. Only AT&T gives everyone the same great deal. Like the Samsung Galaxy S21 5G for free when you trade in. That's for sure.
